name: Skadian Sovnya
description: This weapon can often be seen in the hands of Skadian horsemen. They weren't the ones who first started using it though: Skadians borrowed the design from the Poleds, a tribe inhabiting the shores of the Icy Sea.
descriptionZh: 斯卡迪亚的骑兵手里经常能看到索夫尼亚，可是这种兵器并非斯卡迪亚人发明，而是他们从毗邻冰海的波列部落引入的。
